item.title: Trump angering MAHA with glyphosate order gives Democrats an opening
item.description: Democrats once counted many of the health-conscious followers of Robert F. Kennedy Jr. among their own ranks.

item.title: U.S. and Iran wrap up 'most intense' nuclear talks with no deal — more negotiations ahead
item.description: Iran's nuclear program, enrichment of uranium and its ballistic-missle development program have been at the crux of the negotiations.

item.title: Columbia U. student Elmina Aghayeva released from ICE custody after Trump, NY mayor meeting
item.description: Elmina Aghayev was taken into custody by ICE agents from a student residential building owned by Columbia University.

item.title: Netflix CEO Sarandos visited White House right before streamer said WBD deal is off
item.description: President Donald Trump last weekend demanded that Netflix fire former Obama administration official Susan Rice from its board or else “pay the consequ...

item.title: Trump administration faces first big tariff refund court deadline on Friday
item.description: Trump's DOJ has until Friday to decide on moving a tariff refund case to the Court of International Trade, the first deadline since the Supreme Court ...
